author: andrewpc
text: Unable to pair Xiaomi motion sensor - Simple Descriptor different

author: andrewpc
text:
Using Home Assistant 0.90.1. I have successfully been able to pair Xiaomi temperature, magnet sensors and a lumi plug, however I am unable to successfully join the motion sensor. The device is joined however doesnt work properly as a motion sensor, and is shown as "quirks: false".  
[![Screen Shot 2019-04-02 at 1 55 13 pm](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/5012263/55372894-fd7abc00-554e-11e9-8e48-b49480f11e77.png)](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/5012263/55372894-fd7abc00-554e-11e9-8e48-b49480f11e77.png)

The full join log can be seen here:

<https://pastebin.com/0Hwf4BXR>

author: Adminiuga
text:
Leave the device running and in the log file filter by lines containing `[0x721d:1:0x0406]`. Do you get any **[zigpy.zcl] [0x721d:1:0x0406] Attribute report received: 0=0** ?

```
Apr 02 13:44:39 ha hass[7045]: 2019-04-02 13:44:39 DEBUG (MainThread) [zigpy.zcl] [0x721d:1:0x0406] ZCL request 0x000a: [[<Attribute attrid=0 value=<zigpy.zcl.foundation.TypeValue object at 0x7f5ae47daa90>>]]
Apr 02 13:44:39 ha hass[7045]: 2019-04-02 13:44:39 DEBUG (MainThread) [zigpy.zcl] [0x721d:1:0x0406] Attribute report received: 0=1
```

author: andrewpc
text: Checked 6 hours later and confirming, every log entry is 0=1 despite the sensor being in a location where there would definitely be on and off movement.

author: dmulcahey
text: [@Adminiuga](https://github.com/Adminiuga) they only report the trigger. The quirks unset the state with timers.

author: Adminiuga
text: Yep and I thought we were supporting these, but this specific one seem to lack the IAS cluster.

author: dmulcahey
text: The entire signature is different.. I’ll get a copy for it.

author: andrewpc
text: any updates on this one? thanks

author: andrewpc
dmulcahey
text: Clean up Xiaomi motion and Occupancy handling and add alternate signature

author: dmulcahey
text: Thanks for the beginning of this. I added an official representation that contains both motion and occupancy so that there is consistency in the implementations. See [#64](https://github.com/zigpy/zha-device-handlers/pull/64) for details.

author: andrewpc
text: Thank you! Confirmed working with your new quirk after remove and re-add with both occupancy and motion sensor.
